---
title: "Analysis Template"
author: "241 Final"
#date: "5/10/2021"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
# Load libraries
library(tidyverse)
# Source files
source("../R/header.R")
.src(d = 1)
```

```{r}
# Bach score file path
bach_spline <- "../data-krn/bach_C_notes.krn"
# Two versions of the score
bach <- kern2df(bach_spline)
bach_keys <- piece_df(c("../data-krn/bach_C_notes.krn"), c("keys"))
```
